input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A close-up shows a green cucumber cup filled with prawns, cashews, and garnish on a white plate. Text reads "Prawn and Cashew Cucumber cups" and "Top Chef season 7 ep 7". Lighting remains consistent with no movement or changes to the food state.</think><answer></answer>

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] A close-up shows a green cucumber cup filled with prawns and cashews on a white plate, labeled "Prawn and Cashew Cucumber cups" and "Top Chef season 7 ep 7". A green leaf garnish is added to the top. [4-8] The view cuts to a red logo on a white background reading "Caroline mili Artiss" before fading out. [8-14] A woman with long dark hair stands in a kitchen wearing a blue and pink strapless top. Behind her are wooden cabinets and a toaster. She speaks to the camera while text overlays at the bottom show "www.TopChefShow.com" and "www.CarolineMiLiArtiss.com". From 16s to 28s, a woman wearing a blue and pink strapless top stands in a kitchen featuring wooden cabinets and appliances. Initially, she speaks with her hands clasped at her waist, then unclasps them to gesture outward with palms up. A split-screen transition effect briefly shows rotating panels of the scene. Following this, she holds up a light green bowl containing raw prawns, presenting it towards the camera. She lowers the bowl onto a white cutting board situated on the black countertop. She reaches into the bowl, picks up a single raw prawn in her left hand, and uses a

[56-58] A woman in a blue and pink top cuts a raw prawn on a white cutting board using a knife in her right hand while holding the prawn with her left, with a green bowl visible nearby. [100-106] Hands vigorously stir a mixture of chopped prawns and grated yellow ingredient inside a clear glass bowl using a silver spoon; the left hand stabilizes the bowl on a dark speckled countertop while the right hand mixes rapidly near a black-handled knife. Website text overlays "www.TopChefShow.com" and "www.CarolineMiliArtiss.com" persist at the bottom of the screen.

[106-108] Hands vigorously stir a chopped prawn and yellow ingredient mixture inside a clear glass bowl using a silver spoon, while a black-handled knife rests on the dark countertop. [108-110] The video cuts to a medium shot of a woman in a blue and pink top standing at a stove holding a black wok with a wooden handle; wooden cabinets and a white tiled backsplash are visible. [110-114] She tilts the clear glass bowl over the wok on the burner, using a spoon and her hand to scrape the prawn mixture into the pan. The URLs "www.TopChefShow.com" and "www.CarolineMiLiArtiss.com" appear at the bottom.

[116-118] The woman in the blue and pink top completes pouring prawn mixture from the glass bowl into the black wok on the stove, holding the empty bowl in her left hand and gesturing near the handle. [118-120] She stands at the stove holding the empty glass bowl and reaches with her right hand to grasp the light wooden handle of the black wok on the gas burner. [120-122] Gripping the handle, she looks towards the camera while speaking, with the wok resting on the burner and text overlays "www.TopChefShow.com" and "www.CarolineMiLiArtiss.com" visible. [122-124] She lifts the black wok, tilts it over a clear glass bowl on the black countertop, and pours the cooked prawn mixture into the bowl, using a spatula to scrape the remaining bits out.

[124-134] The woman in the blue and pink top finishes scraping the cooked prawn mixture from a black wok into a clear glass bowl using a white-handled spatula. She leaves the spatula resting in the bowl with the food and holds the empty wok in her left hand. Looking up from the transfer process, she speaks directly to the camera. She continues to hold the black wok over the bowl, shifting her gaze between the camera and the bowl while gesturing with her open right hand near the counter. The website overlays "www.TopChefShow.com" and "www.CarolineMiLiArtiss.com" remain visible at the bottom.

queries.question: What is the season number shown in the title card at the start of the video?

samples.output: <think>The woman in the blue and pink top holds the black wok in her left hand while gesturing with her open right hand near the counter. She looks towards the camera while speaking. The kitchen background remains static with website text overlays visible.</think><answer></answer>

samples.output: <think>The woman in the blue and pink top slices a green cucumber on the wooden cutting board. She holds the vegetable with her left hand and cuts with a large knife in her right. A glass bowl containing a mixture sits nearby. Website text overlays remain visible at the bottom.</think><answer>1</answer>
